TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: Sainr-frog4_lalo a tahaeS

S.FORM: korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma' kitkita' ka takem.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩和狗在看青蛙。
A child and a dog were looking at a frog.

S.FORM: takem takem 'leb ray ray binisitan.
S.TRANSL: (They) kept the frog in a bottle.

S.FORM: isaa korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma'rem ila.
S.TRANSL: The child and the dog (went to) sleep.

S.FORM: roehaenaen takem nonak kas nonak ma kas'oehaz.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙自己(從瓶子)出來了。
The frog came out (of the bottle) by itself.

S.FORM: isaa ririm'aenaen hini korkoring ki 'aehoe' koSa:.
S.TRANSL: In the morning, the child and the dog said,

S.FORM: o man ka takem hayno' ila hini'.
isaa 'am'amoeh am hibae: ka kayba:en sa.
S.TRANSL: They put on their clothes quickly.

S.FORM: ki:im ray kayba:en.
S.TRANSL: (They) looked (for the frog) in the clothes.

S.FORM: ki:im ray kayba:en 'oka' hini' 'aehoe' rima'.
sazek ray binisitan.
S.TRANSL: The dog smelled the inside of the container.

S.FORM: 'oka' isaa.
hini' ka binisitan si a si si tomok ila ray ta'oeloeh noka 'aehoe'.
S.TRANSL: The dog (inserted) its head in the bottle.

S.FORM: hini' ka korkoring Sa takem So'o hayno' ila.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩(說): 青蛙,你在哪裡?

S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'aehoe' sahae' sahae' ray hinoehas sahae' ray ra:i'.
S.TRANSL: 看到這隻狗從窗戶掉到地上。
(The child) saw the dog fall on the ground from the window.

S.FORM: isaa ka binisitan minlakay ila hiza'.
'aehoe' kayzaeh ila 'okay 'okay tatpo'i noka binisitan.
S.TRANSL: The dog was not 'wearing' the bottle (on its head) anymore.

S.FORM: lasia rima' 'oeS'oeSoe'an ila ki 'aehoe' hini' ka korkoring ki 'aehoe' rima' 'oeS'oeSoe'an Sa 'oe'oe ila.
S.TRANSL: They went to the mountain with the dog and called out.

S.FORM: hoy takem hayno' ila So'o.
kita'en hini' 'aehoe' kita' ka boya'.
boya' hini' 'ampowa' kin 'akoy ka boya'.
S.TRANSL: Why are there so many bees here?

S.FORM: isaa hini' korkoring ayo hini' hayza' ka ka minatang.
ka ano'.
takem mti' ma hayza' ilahani 'izo'.
S.TRANSL: The frog may have gone inside there.

S.FORM: hiza 'oe'oe ila sa takem So'o hani ray 'izo'.
S.TRANSL: 他在那裡叫:青蛙,你在裡面嗎?
There he called out, Frog, are you there inside?

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' kita' ka boya' Sa.
rarapal hini' kas'oehaz takem.
S.TRANSL: A squirrel came out, not a frog.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' shi kita' ka boya'.
hahli ryo hahli tee ka ka boya'.
sahae' ila .
hini' korkoring kita' ka hiza' ka ray kaehoey minatang.
S.TRANSL: The child saw a hole up the tree.

S.FORM: koSa: takem hao ray 'izo' 'am rima' ki:im.
S.TRANSL: 他想說青蛙在裡面,就去找。
He thought the frog was inside there, and went to take a look.

S.FORM: ka.
hini' 'aehoe' ma' hahli ka paksahae' ka boya' sowawen ila noka boya'.
S.TRANSL: 狗也在搖蜂窩,使蜂窩掉下來,蜂就追狗。
The dog was also shaking the beehive (until it) fell (to the ground), and the bees chased (the dog)

S.FORM: isahini korkoring ma sowawen noka kal'oe.
S.TRANSL: The owl also chased the child.

S.FORM: ka kaSna'itol ray ray bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.TRANSL: (The boy) climbed up the rock and called the frog.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma' 'ima sazek sa takem hahano.
S.TRANSL: The dog sniffed for the frog.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe 'oe'oe.
hini' ka 'aehoe' rima' ray bato' hikor.
S.TRANSL: The dog went behind the rock.

S.FORM: kita'en ka hini' wae'ae' wae'ae' kas'oehaz homses hini'.
wae'ae' ma' homses 'ae'ae:aew ila 'ae'ae:aew o.
S.TRANSL: The deer also got frightened and ran away.

S.FORM: mwa:i' ray 'a ray 'ataS o:.
kita'en yo kano' ray hani Sa kano' ray hani Sa 'ima maatol a.
'iyahimi' isaa ka 'aehoe' Sa t 'iyahimi'.
S.TRANSL: He told the dog to 'be quiet.'

S.FORM: isaa ray kaehoey hikor ray kaehoey hikor kita' ka takem ma maatol.
S.TRANSL: 看到青蛙在樹後面唱歌。
(They) saw the frog singing behind the rock.

S.FORM: i:wa' ay sia mwa:i' ki:im ka taew'an takem mwa:i' ki:im ka taew'an nisia.
S.TRANSL: So the frog was looking for its home.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'ima 'ol'ola'an ka takem ma' kas'oehaz ila saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 所有的青蛙也都出來了。
All the small frogs came out too.

S.FORM: koSa'en ila ina inoka hiza' a takem a ka ka korkoring.
hini takem ma'an kaalibihin.
S.TRANSL: 這是我的青蛙,我要帶回去。
This is my frog, which I will take back.

S.FORM: isaa ma pil'awan ila kila takem hini' isaa pil'awan takem ma'an hini' a takem kaalibihin ila.
S.TRANSL: 我要把我的青蛙帶回去了。
I will take my frog back.

S.FORM: pil'awan.
